questions.question: List all files in the current directory that start with 'doc', 'image', or 'video', and have a size greater than 100KB
questions.hint: Use the 'ls' command with the '-l' and '-' options

questions.question: Find all files with permissions that are readable by the owner only, and writable by the group only
questions.hint: Use the 'ls' command with the '-R' and '-G' options

questions.question: List all files in the current directory that do not contain the word 'example' in their name, but do contain the word 'test'
questions.hint: Use the 'ls' command with the '-l' and '[!example]*test' pattern
